title: cichorium glandulosum
intro: Cichorium glandulosum, also known as leaf-endicott or prickly chicory, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cichorium glandulosum include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and act as a natural diuretic, making it useful for treating conditions such as arthritis and urinary tract infections. Cichorium glandulosum can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or dried root infusion, and is also sometimes used as a food ingredient.
